facts.statement: Volga Trade Holdings Limited is a registered entity in Cyprus (DRCOR HE 412233; LEI 2138000000000000B002).
Igor Petrov holds an ownership-or-control interest of more than 50% in Volga Trade Holdings Limited.
A controlling individual named Igor Petrov matches an OpenSanctions consolidated sanctions-list entry.

risks.label: Related party sanctioned
risks.rationale: A controlling individual of the subject (Igor Petrov) name-matches an entry on a consolidated sanctions list; the match is by name and date components, not a confirmed identifier.

risks.label: Non-EU jurisdiction
risks.rationale: The ultimate controlling party is resident outside the EU/EEA, which the AMLA rule flags for enhanced review.

gaps: The sanctions match is on name and partial date only; positive identification requires manual confirmation against the source listing.
